mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FOODHIS_TRAN( USER_UUID, EAT_DATE, EAT_TYPE, MEAL_TYPE, PREDICTED_IMAGE_PATH, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM ) VALUES( #{userUuid}, #{eatDate}, #{eatType}, #{mealType}, #{predictedImagePath}, sysdate(), sysdate() )

INSERT INTO T_FOOD_TRAN( FOODHIS_SEQ, EAT_AMOUNT, FOOD_IMAGEPATH, FOOD_ID, FOOD_NAME, KEY_NAME, CALCIUM, CALORIES, CARBONHYDRATE, CHOLESTEROL, CUSTOM_FOOD_INFO, DIETRAYFIBER, FAT, FOOD_TYPE, PROTEIN, RAW_CALORIES, RAW_TOTAL_GRAM, SATURATEDFAT, SODIUM, SUGAR, TOTAL_GRAM, TRANSFAT, UNIT, VITAMINA, VITAMINB, VITAMINC, VITAMIND, VITAMINE ) VALUES( #{foodhisSeq}, #{eatAmount}, #{foodImagepath}, #{foodId}, #{foodName}, #{keyName}, #{calcium}, #{calories}, #{carbonhydrate}, #{cholesterol}, #{customFoodInfo}, #{dietrayfiber}, #{fat}, #{foodType}, #{protein}, #{rawCalories}, #{rawTotalGram}, #{saturatedfat}, #{sodium}, #{sugar}, #{totalGram}, #{transfat}, #{unit}, #{vitamina}, #{vitaminb}, #{vitaminc}, #{vitamind}, #{vitamine} )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_FOODHIS_TRAN SET EAT_DATE = #{eatDate}, EAT_TYPE = #{eatType}, MEAL_TYPE = #{mealType}, PREDICTED_IMAGE_PATH = #{predictedImagePath}, MOD_DTM = sysdate() WHERE FOODHIS_SEQ = #{foodhisSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FOOD_TRAN( FOODHIS_SEQ, EAT_AMOUNT, FOOD_IMAGEPATH, FOOD_ID, FOOD_NAME, KEY_NAME, CALCIUM, CALORIES, CARBONHYDRATE, CHOLESTEROL, CUSTOM_FOOD_INFO, DIETRAYFIBER, FAT, FOOD_TYPE, PROTEIN, RAW_CALORIES, RAW_TOTAL_GRAM, SATURATEDFAT, SODIUM, SUGAR, TOTAL_GRAM, TRANSFAT, UNIT, VITAMINA, VITAMINB, VITAMINC, VITAMIND, VITAMINE ) VALUES( #{foodhisSeq}, #{eatAmount}, #{foodImagepath}, #{foodId}, #{foodName}, #{keyName}, #{calcium}, #{calories}, #{carbonhydrate}, #{cholesterol}, #{customFoodInfo}, #{dietrayfiber}, #{fat}, #{foodType}, #{protein}, #{rawCalories}, #{rawTotalGram}, #{saturatedfat}, #{sodium}, #{sugar}, #{totalGram}, #{transfat}, #{unit}, #{vitamina}, #{vitaminb}, #{vitaminc}, #{vitamind}, #{vitamine} )
mapper.select: SELECT T1.FOODHIS_SEQ AS foodhisSeq, T2.PREDICTED_IMAGE_PATH AS imagePath, MAX(T1.FOOD_NAME) AS foodName, CONCAT(CASE WHEN HOUR(T2.REG_DTM) < 12 THEN '오전' ELSE '오후' END,' ',DATE_FORMAT(T2.REG_DTM, '%h:%i')) AS regDtm, CAST(T2.TOTAL_CALORIES AS UNSIGNED) AS totalCalories, CAST(T2.carbonhydrate AS UNSIGNED) AS carbonhydrate, CAST(T2.protein AS UNSIGNED) AS protein, CAST(T2.fat AS UNSIGNED) AS fat FROM T_FOOD_TRAN T1 JOIN ( SELECT A.FOOD_SEQ, B.REG_DTM, B.PREDICTED_IMAGE_PATH, SUM(A.CALORIES) AS TOTAL_CALORIES, SUM(A.carbonhydrate) AS carbonhydrate, SUM(A.protein) AS protein, SUM(A.fat) AS fat FROM T_FOOD_TRAN A LEFT JOIN T_FOODHIS_TRAN B ON A.FOODHIS_SEQ = B.FOODHIS_SEQ WHERE A.FOODHIS_SEQ IN ( SELECT FOODHIS_SEQ FROM T_FOODHIS_TRAN WHERE DATE(REG_DTM) = #{regDtm} AND USER_UUID = #{userUuid} ) GROUP BY A.FOOD_SEQ,B.REG_DTM ) T2 ON T1.FOODHIS_SEQ = T2.FOODHIS_SEQ WHERE T1.FOODHIS_SEQ = T2.FOODHIS_SEQ AND T1.FOOD_NAME != '음식아님' GROUP BY T1.FOODHIS_SEQ,T2.PREDICTED_IMAGE_PATH
SELECT USER_UUID, EAT_DATE , FOOD_NAME FROM T_FOOD_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid} AND EAT_DATE = #{start} ORDER BY EAT_DATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FOOD_TRAN ( USER_UUID , EAT_DATE , EAT_STIME , EAT_ETIME , FOOD_NAME , FOOD_DANWI , FOOD_CNT , FOOD_ACNT , FOOD_MSEQ , REG_DTTM , MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{eatDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y%m%d'), #{eatStime}, #{eatEtime}, #{foodName}, #{foodDanwi}, 1, #{foodAcnt}, 1, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}, EAT_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{eatDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y%m%d'), EAT_STIME = #{eatStime}, EAT_ETIME = #{eatEtime}, FOOD_NAME = #{foodName}, FOOD_DANWI = #{foodDanwi}, FOOD_CNT = 1, FOOD_ACNT = #{foodAcnt}, FOOD_MSEQ = 1, MOD_DTTM = NOW()
mapper.select: WITH RANKED AS( SELECT FOOD_SEQ , USER_UUID , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(EAT_DATE, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS EAT_DATE , EAT_STIME , EAT_ETIME , FOOD_NAME , FOOD_CNT , CASE WHEN FOOD_ACNT = '' THEN FOOD_CNT ELSE FOOD_ACNT END FOOD_ACNT , REG_DTTM , MOD_DTTM , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EAT_DATE ORDER BY EAT_DATE , EAT_ETIME DESC) AS RN FROM T_FOOD_TRAN WHERE STR_TO_DATE(EAT_DATE, '%Y%m%d') BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{startDt}, '-', ''), '%Y%m%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{endDt}, '-', ''), '%Y%m%d') AND USER_UUID = #{userUuid} ) SELECT FOOD_SEQ , CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN EAT_DATE ELSE EAT_DATE END EAT_DATE , EAT_STIME , FOOD_NAME , FOOD_CNT , FOOD_ACNT FROM RANKED ORDER BY EAT_DATE DESC , EAT_STIME DESC
SELECT FOOD_SEQ , FOOD_NAME , FOOD_KCAL , REG_DTTM , MOD_DTTM FROM T_FOOD_MST WHERE 1=1 AND FOOD_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%' #{findData} '%') ORDER BY FOOD_NAME ASC
